# Verifyco

> Verifyco is an iPhone app for on-device forensic verification of photos and videos. It fuses five forensic signals (C2PA content credentials, metadata forensics, neural face analysis, motion/temporal consistency, DCT frequency analysis) into a 0-100 trust score to detect deepfakes, AI-generated and manipulated media. Analysis runs entirely on-device via Apple's Neural Engine - nothing is uploaded, no account required, works offline. Free to try.

App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6772592963

## Key pages

- [Home](https://verifyco.info/): product overview, how it works, pricing
- [DeepDetect+](https://verifyco.info/deepdetect-plus): the advanced detection engine
- [Support](https://verifyco.info/support)
- [Privacy](https://verifyco.info/privacy): no uploads, no accounts, on-device only

## Blog (guides on deepfake & AI-media detection)

- [Someone Made a Deepfake of You: What to Do, Step by Step](https://verifyco.info/blog/what-to-do-if-someone-makes-a-deepfake-of-you): Found a deepfake of yourself — a fake video, voice or intimate image? Here's the emergency checklist: evidence, takedowns, platform reporting, legal options and damage control.
- [Are Deepfakes Illegal? Deepfake Laws Around the World in 2026](https://verifyco.info/blog/are-deepfakes-illegal-laws-2026): Is making a deepfake a crime? A plain-language map of deepfake laws in 2026 — the US TAKE IT DOWN Act, the EU AI Act's labelling rules, UK, and what's legal, what isn't.
- [How to Tell if a Photo Has Been Edited (7 Checks That Work)](https://verifyco.info/blog/how-to-tell-if-a-photo-is-edited): Not AI — just faked. Learn how to tell if a photo is edited or photoshopped: shadow and edge checks, error level analysis, metadata, reverse search and forensic tools.
- [How Accurate Are AI Detectors, Really? (What the Numbers Mean)](https://verifyco.info/blog/how-accurate-are-ai-detectors): AI detectors claim 99% accuracy — reality is messier. What detection accuracy really means, why false positives happen, what breaks detectors, and how to read a confidence score.
- [AI Voice Cloning Scams: How to Protect Yourself in 2026](https://verifyco.info/blog/ai-voice-cloning-scams-protect-yourself): Scammers can clone a voice from three seconds of audio. Learn how AI voice cloning scams work, the red flags of a fake voice call, and the habits that actually protect you.
- [How to Tell if a Video Is AI-Generated (2026 Guide)](https://verifyco.info/blog/how-to-tell-if-a-video-is-ai-generated): Sora-class models now make video from a text prompt. Learn how to tell if a video is AI-generated: physics tells, texture artifacts, provenance checks and forensic tools.
- [Deepfake Detector Apps: 7 Things to Check Before You Trust One](https://verifyco.info/blog/deepfake-detector-app-what-to-look-for): Not all deepfake detector apps are equal. Here are the 7 things that separate a trustworthy AI detector from a coin flip — privacy, multi-signal analysis, honesty and more.
- [How to Check If a Photo Is Real or AI on Your iPhone (2026)](https://verifyco.info/blog/check-if-photo-is-ai-on-iphone): Want to verify a photo right on your iPhone without uploading it anywhere? Here's how to check if an image is real or AI-generated, privately and on-device.
- [How to Spot a Deepfake Video: 9 Warning Signs for 2026](https://verifyco.info/blog/how-to-spot-a-deepfake-video): Deepfake videos are fooling almost everyone in 2026. Learn the 9 signs that still give them away — plus why your eyes alone aren't enough anymore.
- [How to Tell If an Image Is AI-Generated: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://verifyco.info/blog/how-to-tell-if-an-image-is-ai-generated): Can't tell if a photo is real or AI? Learn the 2026 method that actually works: provenance checks, detector tools, and the physics cues AI still gets wrong.
- [Content Credentials (C2PA) Explained: The Nutrition Label for Photos](https://verifyco.info/blog/content-credentials-c2pa-explained): What are Content Credentials? How C2PA provenance works, how to check a photo's origin, what it can and can't prove — and why it's becoming the web's trust layer.
- [How to Spot Fake AI Profile Pictures on Dating Apps & Social Media](https://verifyco.info/blog/spot-fake-ai-profile-pictures): Romance scammers and bot networks run on AI-generated profile photos. Learn the visual tells of a fake profile picture, the reverse-search workflow, and how to verify in seconds.
- [What Is a Deepfake? A Plain-English Guide (2026)](https://verifyco.info/blog/what-is-a-deepfake): Deepfakes explained simply: what they are, how they're made, why they've become so convincing, the real-world risks, and how to tell a synthetic face or voice from the real thing.
- [5 Signs a Video Has Been Deepfaked (+ How to Check)](https://verifyco.info/blog/5-signs-a-video-has-been-deepfaked): A practical checklist for spotting deepfaked video — the edge artifacts, lip-sync drift, lighting tells, unnatural motion and audio clues that still give synthetic clips away.
- [On-Device Verification, Explained (Nothing Leaves Your iPhone)](https://verifyco.info/blog/on-device-verification-explained): Why Verifyco runs entirely on your iPhone: how on-device forensic analysis works, what the Neural Engine does, cloud vs on-device trade-offs, and why nothing is ever uploaded.

## Languages

The blog is also available in: Turkish (https://verifyco.info/tr/blog), Spanish (https://verifyco.info/es/blog), German (https://verifyco.info/de/blog), French (https://verifyco.info/fr/blog), Italian (https://verifyco.info/it/blog), Portuguese (https://verifyco.info/pt/blog), Arabic (https://verifyco.info/ar/blog)
